data.title: Sunrise Shares Holdings Updates on Director Training Compliance
data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Sunrise Shares Holdings Ltd ( (SG:581) ) has provided an announcement.

Sunrise Shares Holdings Ltd announced updates regarding the training requirements for its newly appointed directors. Datuk Ng Bee Ken, an Independent Non-Executive Director, has not completed all required training modules due to scheduling conflicts but plans to finish them soon. Meanwhile, Executive Director Nicholas Eng Teng Cheng has successfully completed all requisite training, including a module on Environmental, Social, and Governance Essentials, within the stipulated time frame. These updates reflect the company’s commitment to compliance with SGX-ST’s Catalist Rules, ensuring that its directors are well-prepared for their roles, which is crucial for maintaining governance standards and stakeholder confidence.

More about Sunrise Shares Holdings Ltd

Sunrise Shares Holdings Ltd, incorporated in Singapore, operates in the financial sector, focusing on investments and holdings. The company is involved in managing a diverse portfolio and aims to enhance shareholder value through strategic investments.

Average Trading Volume: 1,921,729

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$9.44M

data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

An announcement from Endeavour Mining ( (TSE:EDV) ) is now available.

Endeavour Mining Plc announced that as of November 30, 2025, its total issued ordinary share capital was 241,331,005 shares, with no shares held in treasury. This total number of voting rights is crucial for shareholders to determine their notification requirements under the UK Financial Conduct Authority’s rules. This announcement provides transparency and clarity for stakeholders regarding their voting rights and obligations.

More about Endeavour Mining

Endeavour Mining is a leading global gold producer and the largest in West Africa, with operations in Senegal, Côte d’Ivoire, and Burkina Faso. The company is a member of the World Gold Council and is committed to responsible mining practices, delivering sustainable value to its stakeholders and the communities in which it operates. Endeavour Mining is listed on both the London Stock Exchange and the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol EDV.

The latest update is out from Prudential ( (GB:PRU) ).

Prudential plc has announced a change in its issued shares following a repurchase and cancellation of 292,129 ordinary shares. This adjustment, which took place on December 2, 2025, resulted in a slight reduction of 0.011431% in the total number of issued shares, reflecting the company’s ongoing efforts to manage its capital structure effectively. The impact of this share repurchase on Prudential’s market positioning is minimal, but it demonstrates the company’s commitment to optimizing shareholder value.

The latest update is out from Aluminum of China ( (HK:2600) ).

Aluminum Corporation of China Limited has announced a supplemental notice for its Extraordinary General Meeting (EGM) scheduled for December 22, 2025. The meeting will consider a new resolution proposed by the controlling shareholder, Aluminum Corporation of China, regarding the acquisition of minority equity interests in subsidiaries by Yunnan Aluminum. This proposal reflects the company’s strategic move to consolidate its holdings and potentially enhance its operational efficiency and market positioning.

Topps Tiles ( (GB:TPT) ) has issued an update.

Topps Tiles Plc has announced that its non-executive Chair, Paul Forman, will take on the role of Non-Executive Chair designate at 4imprint Group plc, effective from January 2026, and will assume the full Chair position in March 2026. This move is part of the company’s ongoing strategic positioning and may influence its governance dynamics, potentially impacting stakeholder relations and market perception.

Topps Tiles Plc is the UK’s largest specialist supplier of tiles and associated products, serving the UK domestic, commercial, and housebuilder markets. Muthoot Microfin Ltd ( (IN:MUTHOOTMF) ) has provided an announcement.

Muthoot Microfin Limited has issued a corrigendum regarding a previous disclosure about the issuance of securities, correcting a typographical error in the number of securities. The company confirmed the issuance of 30,000 secured, rated, listed, redeemable, taxable non-convertible debentures (NCDs) in two tranches, each with a face value of ₹1,00,000, totaling ₹300 crores. This move is part of their strategy to raise capital through private placement, as approved by their board and shareholders, which is expected to strengthen their financial position and support their growth initiatives.

More about Muthoot Microfin Ltd

Muthoot Microfin Limited operates in the financial services industry, focusing on providing microfinance solutions. The company primarily offers micro-loans to underserved segments, aiming to empower small entrepreneurs and individuals in rural and semi-urban areas.

Leading Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:6999) ) just unveiled an update.

Leading Holdings Group Limited has announced the resignation of Ms. Ma Wing Yee as the company secretary and an authorised representative. This resignation has led to non-compliance with certain listing rules on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, as the company currently lacks a company secretary and the required number of authorised representatives. The company is actively seeking suitable candidates to fill these vacancies to ensure compliance with the listing rules.
